languages.text: "Если честно, сведений у меня удручающе мало. Подкрепление должно было прибыть не позднее чем полдня назад, однако что-то их задержало. Нам неизвестны ни их численность, ни имена командиров. С отпрыском Гапраков мы надеялись познакомиться по прибытии. А попытки что-либо выяснить ни к чему не привели: вокс-частота Гапраков молчит даже в редкие минуты, когда удается пробиться сквозь помехи." {n}Лария с досадой сжимает в руке вокс-передатчик, будто это он упрямится и не желает отвечать.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Если честно, сведений у меня удручающе мало. Подкрепление должно было прибыть не позднее чем полдня назад, однако что-то их задержало. Нам неизвестны ни их численность, ни имена командиров. С отпрыском Гапраков мы надеялись познакомиться по прибытии. А попытки что-либо выяснить ни к чему не привели: вокс-частота Гапраков молчит даже в редкие минуты, когда удается пробиться сквозь помехи." {n}Лария с досадой сжимает в руке вокс-передатчик, будто это он упрямится и не желает отвечать.{/n}

languages.text: "Frankly, the information is scarce, which is disheartening. The reinforcements should have arrived no later than half a day ago, but something delayed them. We do not know their numbers or the names of their commanders. We had hoped to meet the Gaprak scion on his arrival. That is all we were able to find out — the vox-frequency of the Gapraks is silent even in the rare moments when we manage to get through the interference." {n}Laria squeezes the vox-transmitter in her hand in irritation, as if it were the one being stubborn and refusing to answer.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Если честно, сведений у меня удручающе мало. Подкрепление должно было прибыть не позднее чем полдня назад, однако что-то их задержало. А попытки что-либо выяснить ни к чему не привели: вокс-частота Гапраков молчит даже в редкие минуты, когда удается пробиться сквозь помехи." {n}Лария с досадой сжимает в руке вокс-передатчик, будто это он упрямится и не желает отвечать.{/n}

We do not know their numbers or the names of their commanders. We had hoped to meet the Gaprak scion on his arrival. That is all we were able to find out: the vox-frequency of the Gapraks is silent even in the rare moments when we can get through the interference." {n}Laria squeezes the vox-transmitter in her hand in irritation, as if it were the one being stubborn and refusing to answer.{/n}

"Frankly, the information is scarce, which is disheartening. The reinforcements should have arrived no later than half a day ago, but something delayed them. We do not know their numbers or the names of their commanders. We had hoped to meet the Gaprak scion on his arrival. That is all we were able to find out — the vox-frequency of the Gapraks is silent even in the rare moments when we manage to get through the interference." {n}Laria squeezes the vox-transmitter in her hand in irritation, as if it were the one being stubborn and refusing to answer.{/n}

"Allow me to tell you what we do not know instead. The reinforcements should have arrived no later than half a day ago, but something delayed them. We do not know their numbers or the names of their commanders. We had hoped to meet the Gaprak scion on his arrival. But the worst part is that we cannot find out any more than that: the vox-frequency of the Gapraks is silent even in the rare moments when we can get through the interference." {n}Laria squeezes the vox-transmitter in her hand in irritation, as if it were the one being stubborn and refusing to answer.{/n}

We do not know their numbers or the names of their commanders. We had hoped to meet the Gaprak scion on his arrival. That is all we were able to find out — the vox-frequency of the Gapraks is silent even in the rare moments when we manage to get through the interference." {n}Laria squeezes the vox-transmitter in her hand in irritation, as if it were the one being stubborn and refusing to answer.{/n}

languages.text: “坦白说，很遗憾，没什么消息。援军本来最迟半日前就该到了，但显然被什么事拖住了。我们不清楚他们有多少人，也不知道指挥官是谁。我们本想等贾帕克家的子嗣一到就与他碰面，但即便偶尔克服了干扰，接通了音阵通讯，贾帕克家的音阵频道也毫无回应。这就是我们知道的全部了。”{n}菈丽雅烦躁地捏着手里的音阵传输器，就好像它才是那个死活不肯回应的家伙。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Frankly, the information is scarce, which is disheartening. The reinforcements should have arrived no later than half a day ago, but something delayed them. We do not know their numbers or the names of their commanders. We had hoped to meet the Gaprak scion on his arrival. That is all we were able to find out — the vox-frequency of the Gapraks is silent even in the rare moments when we manage to get through the interference." {n}Laria squeezes the vox-transmitter in her hand in irritation, as if it were the one being stubborn and refusing to answer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “坦白说，很遗憾，没什么消息。援军本来最迟半日前就该到了，但显然被什么事拖住了。我们不清楚他们有多少人，也不知道指挥官是谁。我们本想等贾帕克家的子嗣一到就与他碰面，但即便偶尔克服了干扰，接通了音阵通讯，贾帕克家的音阵频道也毫无回应。这就是我们知道的全部了。”{n}菈丽雅烦躁地捏着手里的音阵传输器，就好像它才是那个死活不肯回应的家伙。{/n}

languages.text: « Franchement, nous n'avons que peu d'informations, ce qui est décourageant. Les renforts auraient dû débarquer il y a une bonne demi-journée, mais quelque chose les a retardés. Nous ignorons leur nombre exact ainsi que les noms de leurs commandants. Nous espérions rencontrer l'héritier des Gaprak à son arrivée. Nous ne savons rien de plus. Leur fréquence-vox ne répond plus, même dans les rares instants où nous parvenons à passer outre les interférences. » {n}Laria serre l'émetteur-vox dans sa main d'un air contrarié, comme si c'était lui qui s'obstinait à faire la sourde oreille.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Frankly, the information is scarce, which is disheartening. The reinforcements should have arrived no later than half a day ago, but something delayed them. We do not know their numbers or the names of their commanders. We had hoped to meet the Gaprak scion on his arrival. That is all we were able to find out — the vox-frequency of the Gapraks is silent even in the rare moments when we manage to get through the interference." {n}Laria squeezes the vox-transmitter in her hand in irritation, as if it were the one being stubborn and refusing to answer.{/n}

Nous ignorons leur nombre exact ainsi que les noms de leurs commandants. Nous espérions rencontrer l'héritier des Gaprak à son arrivée. Nous ne savons rien de plus. Leur fréquence-vox ne répond plus, même dans les rares instants où nous parvenons à passer outre les interférences. » {n}Laria serre l'émetteur-vox dans sa main d'un air contrarié, comme si c'était lui qui s'obstinait à faire la sourde oreille.{/n}

languages.text: "Açıkçası bilgi çok az ve bu durum cesaret kırıcı. Takviyelerin en geç yarım gün önce ulaşmış olması gerekiyordu fakat nedense geciktiler. Sayılarını veya komutanlarının isimlerini bilmiyoruz. Gaprak vârisini geldiği gibi karşılamayı umuyorduk. Tek öğrenebildiğimiz bu... Paraziti aşıp bağlandığımız nadir anlarda bile Gaprakların voks frekansından ses alamıyoruz." {n}Laria, sanki inatçılık edip yanıt vermeyi reddeden kendi voks vericisiymiş gibi elindeki cihazı öfkeyle sıkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Frankly, the information is scarce, which is disheartening. The reinforcements should have arrived no later than half a day ago, but something delayed them. We do not know their numbers or the names of their commanders. We had hoped to meet the Gaprak scion on his arrival. That is all we were able to find out — the vox-frequency of the Gapraks is silent even in the rare moments when we manage to get through the interference." {n}Laria squeezes the vox-transmitter in her hand in irritation, as if it were the one being stubborn and refusing to answer.{/n}

Sayılarını veya komutanlarının isimlerini bilmiyoruz. Gaprak vârisini geldiği gibi karşılamayı umuyorduk. Tek öğrenebildiğimiz bu... Paraziti aşıp bağlandığımız nadir anlarda bile Gaprakların voks frekansından ses alamıyoruz." {n}Laria, sanki inatçılık edip yanıt vermeyi reddeden kendi voks vericisiymiş gibi elindeki cihazı öfkeyle sıkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Francamente, no tenemos mucha información al respecto, lo que ya de por sí es preocupante. Los refuerzos deberían haber llegado hace medio día, a más tardar, pero algo los retrasó. No sabemos ni su cantidad ni los nombres de sus comandantes. Esperábamos recibir al heredero Gaprak con su llegada. Eso es todo lo que hemos podido descubrir: la frecuencia de voco de los Gaprak guarda silencio incluso en los escasos momentos en los que podemos atravesar las interferencias». {n}Laria aprieta el vocotransmisor de su mano, irritada, como si fuera el aparato el que se negara a responder.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Frankly, the information is scarce, which is disheartening. The reinforcements should have arrived no later than half a day ago, but something delayed them. We do not know their numbers or the names of their commanders. We had hoped to meet the Gaprak scion on his arrival. That is all we were able to find out — the vox-frequency of the Gapraks is silent even in the rare moments when we manage to get through the interference." {n}Laria squeezes the vox-transmitter in her hand in irritation, as if it were the one being stubborn and refusing to answer.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Francamente, no tenemos mucha información al respecto, lo que ya de por sí es preocupante. Los refuerzos deberían haber llegado hace medio día, a más tardar, pero algo los retrasó. No sabemos ni su cantidad ni los nombres de sus comandantes. Esperábamos recibir al heredero Gaprak con su llegada. Eso es todo lo que hemos podido descubrir: la frecuencia de voco de los Gaprak guarda silencio incluso en los escasos momentos en los que podemos atravesar las interferencias». {n}Laria aprieta el vocotransmisor de su mano, irritada, como si fuera el aparato el que se negara a responder.{/n}

languages.text: "Offen gesagt haben wir kaum Informationen, was entmutigend ist. Die Verstärkung hätte vor einem halben Tag eintreffen müssen, aber irgendetwas hat sie aufgehalten. Wir kennen weder ihre Zahl, noch die Namen ihrer Kommandeure. Wir hatten gehofft, nach seiner Ankunft mit dem Gaprak-Spross zu reden. Das ist alles, was wir herausfinden konnten. Die Voxfrequenz der Gaprak ist selbst in den seltenen Momenten, in denen wir durch die Interferenzen kommen, tot." {n}Larias Hand umschließt den Vox-Transmitter in ihrer Hand fester, als würde sich dieser weigern, zu antworten.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Frankly, the information is scarce, which is disheartening. The reinforcements should have arrived no later than half a day ago, but something delayed them. We do not know their numbers or the names of their commanders. We had hoped to meet the Gaprak scion on his arrival. Die Voxfrequenz der Gaprak ist selbst in den seltenen Momenten, in denen wir durch die Interferenzen kommen, tot." {n}Larias Hand umschließt den Vox-Transmitter in ihrer Hand fester, als würde sich dieser weigern, zu antworten.{/n}

languages.text: 「正直なところ、情報が乏しく、落胆しています。増援は半日前に到着するはずでしたが、何かで遅延したようです。彼らの人数や指揮官の名前もわかりません。我々は、彼らが到着した時にガプラク家の跡取りと会えることを期待していました。それが我々が得られた情報です。ガプラク家のボイス・周波数は、稀に電波障害を突破できた時でも、沈黙しています。」{n}ラリアは、頑固に電波を遮断しているように、手にしたボイス・送信機を握りしめています。{/n}
